name: Pretzel Thins + Greek Yogurt Ranch Dip
notes: Combo item. Snack Factory Pretzel Crisps ~110 cal per oz (11 crackers). Oikos Greek yogurt dip varies by recipe. Hard to verify exact combo; macros are plausible for ~1oz pretzels + 3/4 cup Greek yogurt ranch. Accepting as-is since it's a custom combo.

name: Loaded Nacho Protein Puffs
notes: Calories confirmed at 120, but protein is 15g per bag, NOT 21g as listed in DB. Multiple sources confirm 15g protein, 2g carbs (not 3g), 5g fat (not 4g). DB protein overstated by 6g. Sugar is <1g.

name: Hi Protein Bar
notes: All macros match DB exactly. 240 cal, 20g protein, 19g carbs, 10g fat, 6g fiber, 4g sugar. Confirmed via Snickers official site.

name: Dry Roasted Edamame
notes: DB says 130 cal per 1 oz but actual serving is 1/3 cup (30g) at 114 cal. The 0.9 oz snack packs are ~100 cal per Amazon listing. Protein matches at 14g. DB carbs 8g vs actual 7g. DB fat 4g vs actual 5g. DB fiber 4g vs actual 5g. DB sugar 1g vs actual 2g. Difference likely due to serving size mismatch (1 oz vs 30g).

name: Dry Roasted Edamame
notes: Same product as edamame-snack-swap. DB says 130 cal, actual is 114 cal per 30g serving. DB carbs 10g vs actual 7g. DB fiber 0g vs actual 5g (significant miss). DB sugar 1g vs actual 2g. Fat 4g vs 5g.

name: Fruity Cereal
notes: Calories confirmed at 130. Protein 8g matches. But DB carbs 18g vs actual 20g, DB fat 3g vs actual 1.5g, DB fiber 1g vs actual 3g. Serving is 1 cup (35g), not '1 serving (35g)'. Multiple sources confirm 130 cal.

name: Three Wishes Cinnamon Cereal
notes: Calories 130 confirmed. Protein 8g matches. DB carbs 20g matches. DB fat 2g is close to actual 1.5g. DB fiber 3g matches. Sugar 3g matches. Within tolerance.

name: Three Wishes Cocoa Cereal
notes: All values match or are very close. Calories 130 confirmed. Protein 8g, carbs 20g, fiber 4g, sugar 3g all match. Fat 2g in DB vs 1.5g actual is minor.

name: Three Wishes Frosted Cereal
notes: All values match DB exactly. 120 cal, 8g protein, 18g carbs, 2g fat, 3g fiber, 3g sugar. Confirmed via Three Wishes and Whole Foods.

name: Three Wishes Honey Cereal
notes: Consistent with Frosted variant macros. 120 cal, 8g protein, 3g sugar confirmed across multiple sources. Carbs/fat/fiber assumed same as Frosted since same base formula.

name: Three Wishes Unsweetened Cereal
notes: Calories 110 confirmed. Protein 8g matches. DB carbs 16g vs verified 15g is minor. DB fat 1.5g vs verified 2g is minor. Fiber 3g and sugar 0g match.

name: Hot Buffalo Protein Chips
notes: Calories 130 and protein 21g confirmed. But DB lists carbs 6g and fat 5g. Verified across multiple sources: carbs are 2g and fat is 4g for Twin Peaks puffs. DB carbs are overstated by 4g, fat overstated by 1g. Note: DB says 'chips' but Twin Peaks makes 'puffs', not traditional chips.

name: Sour Cream & Onion Protein Chips
notes: Same issue as buffalo flavor. Calories and protein correct. DB carbs 6g vs actual 2g, DB fat 5g vs actual 4g. Twin Peaks puffs have consistent macros across flavors: 130 cal, 21g protein, 2g carbs, 4g fat.

name: Twin Peaks Garlic Parmesan Protein Puffs
notes: DB values match verified values. 130 cal, 21g protein, 2g carbs, 4g fat. Consistent with Twin Peaks standard nutrition profile.

name: Twin Peaks Jalapeno Cheddar Protein Puffs
notes: DB says 120 cal but all Twin Peaks puffs are 130 cal per cup (30g). Fat 3g in DB vs verified 4g. All Twin Peaks puffs share the same base macros. 10 cal difference.

name: Twin Peaks Mesquite Barbecue Protein Puffs
notes: All values match. 130 cal, 21g protein, 2g carbs, 4g fat. Standard Twin Peaks puffs macros.

name: Twin Peaks Nacho Cheese Protein Puffs
notes: All values match. 130 cal, 21g protein, 2g carbs, 4g fat, 0g fiber, 1g sugar. Confirmed via EatThisMuch detailed nutrition label.

name: Dark Chocolate Peanut Gems
notes: Calories 220 confirmed. But significant macro differences: DB protein 4g vs actual 5g, DB carbs 20g vs actual 23g, DB fat 12g vs actual 14g, DB fiber 2g vs actual 3g, DB sugar 12g vs actual 19g. Sugar is the biggest miss (12 vs 19g).

name: Ranch Dressing
notes: All values match. 0 calories, 0g fat, 2g carbs (1g fiber, 0g sugar), 0g protein. Confirmed via Walden Farms official site. Product marketed as zero-calorie.

name: Cheddar Cheese Crisps
notes: Calories 110 confirmed for 0.63 oz bag. But DB protein 12g is WRONG - actual is 6g per 18g bag. DB fat 11g is close but actual is 9g. The 28g (1 oz) serving has 170 cal, 10g protein, 14g fat. DB appears to have mixed the 28g and 18g serving data. Protein is the biggest error (12g vs 6g).

name: Parmesan Cheese Crisps
notes: DB says 110 cal but verified at 100 cal per 0.63 oz bag (18g). DB protein 13g vs actual 9g is a significant overstatement. DB fat 10g vs actual 7g. The 28g serving has ~150 cal. DB appears to have used 28g serving protein/fat values for the 18g bag.

name: Whisps Asiago & Pepper Jack Cheese Crisps
notes: All values match DB exactly. 150 cal, 12g protein, 1g carbs, 11g fat, 0g fiber, 0g sugar per 28g serving.

name: Classic Guacamole Mini Cup
notes: MAJOR ERROR: DB says 60 cal but actual is 120 cal per 2 oz mini cup. This is confirmed across multiple sources (Eat Wholly official, EatThisMuch, Kroger, FatSecret). DB fat 5g vs actual 10g, DB carbs 3g vs actual 5g, DB fiber 2g vs actual 3g. DB appears to have used half the actual values.

name: Nashville Hot Chicken Chips
notes: Calories 170 confirmed. Protein 10g matches. But DB carbs 10g vs actual 8g, DB fat 7g vs actual 10g (significant undercount), DB fiber 0g vs actual 2g. DB serving says 1 bag (1.34oz/38g) but verified serving is 20 chips (30g). The 1.34oz bag has ~210 cal.

name: Sea Salt & Vinegar Chicken Chips
notes: DB says 210 cal, verified at 200 cal per 38g bag. DB protein 10g vs actual 14g (understated). DB carbs 10g vs actual 9g. DB fat 7g vs actual 13g (major undercount). DB fiber 0g vs actual 3g. Multiple macro errors even though calories are close.

name: Wilde Barbeque Protein Chips
notes: All values match DB exactly. 210 cal, 13g protein, 10g carbs, 13g fat, 3g fiber, 1g sugar per 38g bag.

name: Wilde Buffalo Style Protein Chips
notes: DB says 170 cal but EatThisMuch shows 160 cal per 30g serving. Protein 10g matches. DB carbs 8g matches. DB fat 10g matches. DB fiber 2g vs actual 3g. Sugar 0.5g matches. 10 cal difference.

name: Wilde Chicken & Waffles Protein Chips
notes: All values match DB exactly. 210 cal, 13g protein, 10g carbs, 13g fat, 3g fiber, 1g sugar per 38g bag. Confirmed across FatSecret and myfooddata.

name: Wilde Himalayan Pink Salt Protein Chips
notes: All values match DB exactly. 170 cal, 10g protein, 8g carbs, 10g fat, 2g fiber, 0.5g sugar per 30g serving.

name: Wilde Spicy Queso Protein Chips
notes: All values match DB exactly. 170 cal, 10g protein, 8g carbs, 10g fat, 2g fiber, 0.5g sugar. Same nutrition profile as Himalayan Pink Salt and Nashville Hot (30g servings).

name: Greek Frozen Yogurt Bar + Whey Shake
notes: Combo item. Yasso Chocolate Fudge bar: 80 cal, 5g protein, 15g carbs, 0g fat. Typical whey isolate scoop: ~120 cal, 25g protein, 1-2g carbs, 0-1g fat. Combined: ~200 cal, 30g protein, ~16g carbs, ~0g fat. DB 220 cal and 25g protein appear off. DB carbs 20g higher than expected ~16g. DB sugar 14g vs estimated ~10g.

name: Organic Giggles
notes: All values match DB exactly. 60 cal, 0g protein, 12g carbs, 1g fat, 0g fiber, 10g sugar per 14g pack. Confirmed via iHerb and multiple sources.

name: Cola
notes: All zeros confirmed. Zevia is a zero-calorie, zero-sugar soda sweetened with stevia. Confirmed via official Zevia site.
